name: roguelike
description_pt: Template de roguelike com geracao procedural, morte permanente, upgrades entre runs e combate por turnos ou em tempo real. Suporta grid-based e free movement.
description_en: Roguelike template with procedural generation, permadeath, between-run upgrades and turn-based or real-time combat. Supports grid-based and free movement.
core_loop: Explorar sala → Combater inimigos → Coletar loot → Avancar andar → Morrer → Gastar moeda persistente → Repetir

scene_structure.game: Mapa procedural + Player + Inimigos + Itens + HUD (vida, ouro, andar)
scene_structure.upgrade_shop: Loja de upgrades persistentes entre runs
scene_structure.game_over: Resumo da run: andares, inimigos, ouro coletado
